**Source**: https://github.com/dotnet/diagnostics  
**Directory**: `src/Tools/dotnet-gcdump/DotNetHeapDump/`

**Pinned commit**: Update this when upgrading  

Files from this project are read-only copies originally from Microsoft/PerfView,
maintained in dotnet/diagnostics.

Vendored files:
- `Graph.cs`
- `MemoryGraph.cs`
- `GCHeapDump.cs`
- `DotNetHeapDumpGraphReader.cs`
- `EventPipeDotNetHeapDumper.cs`
